justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of a high-yield emerging markets corporate bond index, which is a standard financial market metric for credit risk and yield.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread for the ICE BofA High Yield Emerging Markets Corporate Plus Index, which tracks the performance of emerging markets securities rated BB1 or lower within major domestic and Eurobond markets, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-01-18?
